name: XL6009 4A Boost Converter
description: XLSEMI XL6009 400kHz 4A step-up (boost) DC-DC converter, 5-32V input, TO-263-5. WARNING: the metal tab is the SW switch node, not GND - do not pour ground under it.
dimensions_source: XLSEMI XL6009 datasheet Rev1.1 p.8: TO263-5L body 8.64x10.16x4.55, overall 14.35 incl leads, pitch 1.7, lead 0.84, tab ext 1.27. Land derived per IPC (leads 1.05x2.8, tab 10.4x7.0). Pinout p.2 (tab=SW).
